text.title: Gumroad Ops Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: $19 prompt-pack launch with 40% affiliate commission and monthly review.

section.title: Setup
section.p: Solo founder ships a 200-prompt pack for indie devs. Goal: $1k in 60 days via Gumroad + 5 affiliates from IndieHackers.

section.title: Step 1-3 — listing + affiliate
section.code:
listing: product_id: prompt-pack-v3 cover_url: https://gumroad.com/u/cover.png cover_width_px: 1600 cover_height_px: 900 subtitle: "200 copy-paste prompts for solo founders — production-tested, MIT-licensed." price: {mode: fixed, amount_usd: 19} product_type: file refund_policy: 14_day tags: [prompts, indie, ai, templates] uses_mor: true license_api_enabled: false
affiliate: enabled: true commission_pct: 40 payout_cadence: monthly

list.item: Variant A subtitle: "200 copy-paste prompts for solo founders — production-tested, MIT-licensed."
Variant B subtitle: "Skip prompt engineering — 200 production-tested prompts, MIT-licensed, $19 once."
Day 14 readout: A 38 sales / 4.1% conv; B 41 sales / 4.4% conv → adopt B at day 14, surface in IH announcement.

section.title: Step 5 — affiliates
section.p: Recruited 7 IndieHackers affiliates via templates/affiliate-invite.md. Top affiliate drove 12 sales in 30 days ($228 commission). Affiliates promoted in their newsletters; tracked via Gumroad affiliate dashboard.

list.item: Promotion: feature on personal site hero + dedicated Indie Hackers update.

text.example: Digital file product → preconditions met → cover 1600×900 → six listing fields filled → affiliate at 40% → A/B 14d → adopt B → monthly review promotes to hero; APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
